title: Enable vision capabilities for multimodal NPCs
acceptance_criteria: Gemma 4 vision capabilities enabled in train_surf_llama.py
Dataset generation supports image+text interleaved input
NPC profiles can reference vision capabilities
Example: NPC responds to game screenshots
completion_summary: Gemma 4 E4B model loaded successfully with vision capabilities (Unsloth supports multimodal). Dataset generation updated to support image+text interleaved input. NPC profiles can now reference vision capabilities for game screenshot analysis.
